clickToDetail: Click any item to view details.
shortcutNote: Some shortcuts only work when the image grid has focus (click on the grid or an image first).

albums.title: Albums
albums.description: Create and manage albums, organize and categorize images

wallpaper.title: Wallpaper
wallpaper.description: Set desktop wallpaper, rotation and display mode

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Plugin installation, store sources and plugin editor

tray.title: Tray
tray.description: System tray icon location and functions

virtual-driver.title: Virtual Drive (VD)
virtual-driver.description: Browse albums like a disk in Explorer (Windows)

command-line.title: Command Line
command-line.description: Run plugins, pack and import plugins via CLI

easter-egg.title: Easter Egg
easter-egg.description: Small surprises that don't affect functionality

import-drag-drop.title: Quick import by dragging local files
import-drag-drop.summary: Drag into window or Gallery → Start → Local to import images/folders. Desktop supports drag & file picker; Android uses media picker.

gallery-browsing.title: Gallery browsing methods
gallery-browsing.summary: Learn how to view total count, paginate through large collections, and use deduplication.

gallery-preview.title: In-app double-click preview
gallery-preview.summary: When enabled, double-click any image to view full size in-app with zoom, drag, and navigation.

albums-introduction.title: Albums overview
albums-introduction.summary: Albums organize and categorize images. Create albums, add images, set as wallpaper rotation source.

wallpaper-basic.title: Basic wallpaper setup
wallpaper-basic.summary: Right-click image → "Set as wallpaper" for quick single wallpaper.

wallpaper-rotation.title: Rotation vs non-rotation
wallpaper-rotation.summary: Learn the difference between rotation and single wallpaper modes, and how to enable/disable.

wallpaper-mode.title: Native vs window mode
wallpaper-mode.summary: Native mode: better performance. Window mode: more features. Windows/macOS support window mode.

wallpaper-window-video.title: Window mode, video wallpaper, and app exit
wallpaper-window-video.summary: Window mode supports video/GIF wallpaper. Wallpaper disappears when app exits; keep running to persist.

plugin-introduction.title: What are plugins?
plugin-introduction.summary: Plugins are Kabegame's core feature for collecting images from websites. Learn about formats, types, and usage.

plugin-store-basics.title: Plugin store and store sources
plugin-store-basics.summary: Install/update plugins in Source management; add store sources for installable lists.

plugin-import.title: Plugin import methods
plugin-import.summary: Four ways to import .kgpg: double-click, drag into window, import from Source page, or via plugin editor.

plugin-usage.title: How to collect images with plugins
plugin-usage.summary: Open collect dialog from Gallery, select plugin, configure params, set output dir and album, then start.

task-introduction.title: Task overview
task-introduction.summary: Learn what tasks are, what they do, max concurrent tasks, and download limits.

task-viewing.title: View task info, status and images
task-viewing.summary: Learn how to view task info, status and collected images via task drawer and detail page.

task-management.title: Create, delete and stop tasks
task-management.summary: Learn how to create tasks, stop running tasks, and delete tasks (including batch).

tray-introduction.title: Tray location and functions
tray-introduction.summary: Learn tray icon location, left/right click behavior, and menu options.

virtual-driver-basics.title: Browse images via virtual drive in Explorer
virtual-driver-basics.summary: Enable "Album drive" to browse albums and images as files in Explorer.

virtual-driver-directories.title: Virtual drive directory structure
virtual-driver-directories.summary: Learn the purpose of each directory (All, By plugin, By time, By task, Albums).

command-line-basics.title: CLI basics
command-line-basics.summary: Learn Kabegame CLI: run plugins, pack plugins, import plugins.

command-line-examples.title: Common command examples
command-line-examples.summary: Practical examples: import single image, import folder to gallery, etc.

easter-egg-turtle-complaint.title: Fast scrolling triggers turtle complaint
easter-egg-turtle-complaint.summary: Scroll too fast in gallery/album and a playful "turtle can't keep up" message appears.

shortcutGridZoomWheelDesc: Hold Ctrl (Cmd on macOS) and scroll to adjust image grid columns
shortcutGridZoomPlusMinusDesc: Hold Ctrl (Cmd on macOS) and press +/- or = to adjust columns
shortcutSelectAllDesc: Select all images on the current page in the grid
shortcutClearSelectionDesc: Clear selection and close context menu
shortcutDeleteDesc: Delete selected images (triggers app delete flow/confirm)
shortcutRangeSelectDesc: Hold Shift and click to select range from last selection
shortcutToggleSelectDesc: Hold Ctrl (Cmd on macOS) and click to toggle image selection
shortcutCopyImageDesc: Copy current image to clipboard (preview or grid)
shortcutPreviewDeleteDesc: Delete current image in preview (triggers delete flow)
noHelpContent: No help content on this page
